title: Runes of Aldur — runic-stone reward choices
context: On maps, runic stones grant a choice of one reward. All rune skills/supports cost the new Runic Ward resource (not mana/spirit). Verisium Pile is raw runeforging currency (no photo).

recommendation.reason: Support that slots straight into Tempest Flurry / Quarterstaff Strike. A melee Monk Heavy Stuns constantly -> free AoE Runic Shockwave on each stun. Cheap (7 Ward), no playstyle change, flexible. Alternative: Conductive Runes if leaning into lightning/Electrocute to feed Combat Frenzy charges.
recommendation.build_notes: Lightning Monk Invoker, Tempest Flurry combo + shock. Shock = flat 20% increased damage taken (keep elemental ailments ON). Electrocute feeds Combat Frenzy (Frenzy Charge on Electrocute).

source: In-game tooltip screenshots, OCR by assistant. Cross-check balance-sensitive numbers against in-game tooltips.
